keys.backupCreated: Cadangan konci geus dijieun jeung diunduh ✓
keys.restored: Cadangan konci geus dipulihkeun ✓ Konci dipasang sacara lokal
keys.noBackup: Teu aya cadangan anu dienkripsi pikeun akun ieu

keySetup.title: Setél konci alat anjeun
keySetup.description: Alat ieu acan gaduh konci pribadi anjeun. Impor cadangan anu dilindungi ku sandi, atanapi jieun pasang konci anyar (anjeun bakal tiasa maca pesen anyar ti ayeuna).
keySetup.chooseFile: Pilih file jeung asupkeun kecap konci.
keySetup.imported: Kecap konci pribadi geus diimpor ka alat ieu. Ayeuna anjeun tiasa maca pesen heubeul.
keySetup.enterPassword: Asupkeun kecap konci akun anjeun supaya kami tiasa nyadangkeun konci anjeun kalayan aman.

encryptionRecovery.title: Ngatur Enkripsi
encryptionRecovery.description: Nyadangkeun, mulangkeun, muka konci, atawa ngatur ulang konci enkripsi anjeun.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Panyungsi ieu ayeuna teu tiasa ngadekripsi pesen énkripsi anjeun. Pulihkeun, buka konci, atanapi atur deui konci anjeun pikeun neruskeun.
alert.lockedBody: Pulihkeun atawa buka konci konci énkripsi anjeun pikeun maca pesen anu diénkripsi dina alat ieu.

unlockPasscode.label: Buka passcode (alat ayeuna)
unlockPasscode.description: Digunakeun pikeun ngadekripsi konci anjeun sacara lokal saméméh diekspor

restoreBackupPassword.label: Sandhi cadangan
restoreBackupPassword.description: Sandhi anu anjeun jieun nalika nyadangkeun konci anjeun dina iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Kodeu aksés lokal anyar
newLocalPasscode.description: Ngajagi konci nu disimpen dina panyimpen dina panyungsi ieu

resetLocalPasscode.label: Kode aksés lokal anyar
resetLocalPasscode.description: Diperlukeun saméméh ngareset sangkan konci anyar dijaga dina alat ieu

devicePasscode.label: Passcode alat
devicePasscode.description: Lebetkeun passcode anu dianggo pikeun ngajagi konci dina alat ieu.

newDevicePasscode.label: New device passcode
newDevicePasscode.description: Jieun passcode pikeun ngajagi konci dina alat ieu.

resetDevicePasscode.label: Passcode alat anyar
resetDevicePasscode.description: Jieun passcode pikeun konci énkripsi anyar dina alat ieu.

messages.backupCreated: Cadangan konci geus dijieun jeung diunduh.
messages.keyRestored: Konci geus dipulihkeun tina cadangan akun.
messages.resetSuccess: Énkripsi geus diatur ulang kalayan suksés.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Restore konci teu lengkep atawa salah pikeun akun ieu
errors.noBackup: Teu aya cadangan énkripsi pikeun akun ieu
errors.noServerPublicKey: Akun ieu ayeuna henteu nembongkeun konci publik sérver
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Cadangan sérver henteu cocog jeung konci énkripsi akun ayeuna
errors.resetFailed: Teu tiasa ngareset énkripsi. Mangga cobian deui.
errors.restoreFailed: Teu tiasa mulangkeun konci énkripsi anjeun. Pariksa cadangan jeung kecap konci anjeun.
errors.unlockFailed: Teu tiasa muka konci énkripsi anjeun. Pariksa kode akses anjeun jeung cobian deui.

confirm.reset:
Reset énkripsi pikeun akun ieu?

Pesen énkripsi anu langkung lami tiasa jadi teu tiasa dibaca lamun anjeun henteu mulangkeun konci aslina engké.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Ieu ngahasilkeun konci énkripsi anyar pikeun akun anjeun. Pesen énkripsi anu langkung lami tiasa jadi teu tiasa dibaca kecuali anjeun mulangkeun deui konci asli engké.

danger.title: Mimitian énkripsi anyar
danger.body: Ieu nyiptakeun konci énkripsi anyar. Pesen énkripsi anu langkung lami tiasa jadi teu tiasa dibaca kecuali anjeun mulangkeun deui konci asli engké.

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Anggo kode akses alat anjeun atanapi pulihkeun cadangan pikeun muka konci pesen anu dienkripsi.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Pulihkeun konci obrolan anu dienkripsi tina cadangan anu dilindungi ku kecap konci cadangan anjeun.

smsConsent.label: Abdi satuju nampi béwara SMS sareng bewara ti {{companyName}}. Frekuénsi pesen tiasa béda-béda. Tarif pesen & data tiasa dilarapkeun. Bales <stop>STOP</stop> pikeun ngabatalkeun iraha waé. Bales <help>HELP</help> pikeun bantosan.

auth.headline: Pesen aman pikeun saha waé, di mana waé
auth.description: Enkripsi ti mimiti nepi ka tungtung, tarjamahan ka leuwih ti 100 basa, pesen anu leungit, jeung telepon sora/vidio.

feature.encryption: Enkripsi ti mimiti nepi ka tungtung sacara standar
feature.privacy: Prioritas privasi. Data anjeun, kontrol anjeun.

hero.line1: Pesen aman pikeun saha waé, di mana waé — kalayan
hero.sub: Meunangkeun nomer telepon aman gratis pikeun nelepon jeung ngirim pesen ka sakuliah dunya ngaliwatan Wi-Fi atawa data. Rasakeun énkripsi end-to-end, pesen anu leungit, jeung nelepon sora/vidio HD — kalayan alat bawaan anu ngabantu anjeun tetep nyambung ngaliwatan wates nagara.
hero.freeNote: Nelepon jeung ngirim pesen dasar téh gratis. AI canggih jeung fitur premium merlukeun upgrade.

feat.translate: Ngalanggar halangan basa dina paguneman anjeun
feat.privacy: Prioritas privasi. Data anjeun, anjeun nu ngadalikeun.

auth.desktopTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.
auth.scanHelper: Dina desktop? Pindai nganggo telepon anjeun pikeun meunangkeun aplikasi.
auth.subhead: Pesenan pribadi, énkripsi, jeung ditarjamahkeun — langsung.
auth.tip: Tip: Paké akun anu sarua di web jeung mobile. Pesen anjeun bakal tetep sinkron.
auth.scanHint: Pindai pikeun ngundeur aplikasi atawa muka dina panyungsi anjeun.

registration.passwordDescription: Sahenteuna 6 karakter. Anggo kecap konci anu kuat jeung unik.
registration.smsConsent: Ku nyieun akun, anjeun satuju nampi béwara SMS nu patali jeung kagiatan Chatforia anjeun (sapertos pesen ti pangguna séjén). Biaya pesen & data tiasa dilarapkeun. Anjeun tiasa ngeureunkeun iraha waé dina Setélan.
registration.phoneHelp: Digunakeun pikeun verifikasi, kaamanan, jeung fitur SMS lamun dirojong.
registration.title: Jieun akun Chatforia anjeun

auth.addRecipient: Tambahkeun panarima di luhur pikeun ngamimitian…
auth.enterValidRecipient: Asupkeun nami kontak anu geus disimpen atawa nomer telepon.
auth.sendFailed: Ngirim gagal. Pariksa konsol pikeun detil.

errors.invalidInput: Mangga parios inpormasi anjeun sareng cobian deui.
errors.smsConsent: Mangga tampi idin SMS pikeun neruskeun.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Teuing loba usaha. Mangga antosan sareng cobian deui.
errors.usernameOrEmailTaken: Nami pangguna atawa email éta geus aya nu maké.

login.title: Teruskeun ka Chatforia
login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on ayeuna teu sayogi. Anggo nami pangguna & kecap konci gantina.

verification.sent: Surélék verifikasi parantos dikirim. Pariksa kotak asup anjeun.

error.invalid: Nami pangguna atawa kecap konci teu sah
error.unprocessable: Paménta teu sah. Pariksa ngaran pamaké/email jeung kecap konci anjeun.
error.deviceLimit: Wates alat geus kahontal pikeun rencana Gratis. Log out dina alat séjén atawa upgrade ka Premium pikeun ngahubungkeun langkung seueur alat.

forgotPassword.title: Poho Sandi
forgotPassword.helper: Lebetkeun email anu anjeun anggo pikeun nyieun akun Chatforia anjeun sarta kami bakal ngirimkeun tautan aman pikeun ngatur ulang sandi anjeun.
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: Mangga lebetkeun alamat email anu sah.
forgotPassword.genericError: Teu tiasa ngolah pamundut. Mangga cobian deui engké.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Lamun aya akun jeung email éta, kami geus ngirim tautan reset sandi. Éta bisa nyokot sababaraha menit pikeun nepi. Pastikeun mariksa folder spam atawa promosi anjeun.

resetPassword.title: Reset Sandi
resetPassword.missingToken: Token reset sandi anu teu sah atawa leungit.
resetPassword.missingTokenHelper: Token anu teu sah atawa leungit. Mangga menta tautan reset sandi anyar.
resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Pilih sandhi anu kuat anu henteu anjeun anggo di tempat séjén.

home.title: Home
home.messagesSubtitle: Lebetkeun nu nampi di luhur, teras kirim pesen pikeun ngamimitian paguneman.
home.mixedRecipients: Mixed recipients detected. Use either all phone numbers (SMS) or all usernames (Chatforia).
home.addRecipient: Tambahkeun panarima di luhur pikeun ngamimitian…
home.needNumber: Anjeun peryogi nomer Chatforia sateuacan ngirim SMS.
home.enterValidRecipient: Lebetkeun nami kontak anu geus disimpen, nami pangguna, atawa nomer telepon.

composer.sendDisabled: Type a message or attach a file to send.

sidebar.loginPrompt: Log in to edit your settings.

chat.selectPrompt: Pilih téks atawa rohangan obrolan pikeun ngamimitian ngobrol
chat.blockConfirm: Blokir {{name}}? Anjeun moal nampi pesen ti maranéhna.
chat.blockError: Teu tiasa nangtukeun pamaké sasaran pikeun diblokir.
chat.unlockToView: Buka konci kuncimu pikeun ningali pesen ieu
chat.clearConfirm: Hapus paguneman ieu? Ieu moal bisa dibatalkeun.

messageInput.freeLimit: Free plan limit: auto-delete up to 1 day. Clamped to 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Wates auto-delete maksimum pikeun Premium nyaéta 30 dinten. Diwatesan nepi ka 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Tipe pesen atawa lampirkeun file pikeun dikirim.
messageInput.caption: Katerangan (opsional)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Lampiran teuing gedé. Coba file anu leuwih leutik.
errors.rateLimit: Anjeun ngirim pesen teuing gancang. Mangga laun-laun.
errors.validation: Validation error. Please check your message and try again.
errors.failedToSend: Failed to send. You can retry the failed bubble.
errors.upgradeRequired: Upgrade required to use this feature.

messages.addCaptionThenSend: Add a caption, then tap Send
messages.noOneHasReadThisMessageYet: No one has read this message yet.

mediaGallery.noMediaCached: Teu acan aya média nu disimpen sacara lokal.

status.captionLabel: Naon nu aya dina pikiran anjeun?
status.filesNote: Up to 5 files. 24h expiry by default.

contactList.notJoined: Kontak éta can gabung ka Chatforia.

contactList.noRoute: Teu aya rute pikeun kontak ieu.

addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: Anjeun teu tiasa nambahkeun diri sorangan salaku kontak.

startChatModal.title: Mimitian paguneman
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Pilarian nami, nami pangguna, atawa nomer telepon
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Teu aya kontak nu cocog jeung pilarian anjeun.
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Type a name, username, phone, or email…
startChatModal.startWithSelected: Mimitian obrolan jeung nu geus dipilih
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Pilarian ku ngaran pamaké atawa telepon
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Tipeun ngaran pamaké atawa telepon teras pencét Pilarian.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Entri telepon/email bakal sayogi sanggeus anjeun nyimpenna salaku kontak.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Gagal ngamimitian obrolan jeung panarima anu dipilih.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Search saved contacts by alias, name, username, or phone
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Atur kontak anjeun jeung ngajak babaturan.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Bagi tautan undangan anjeun pikeun ngamimitian ngobrol langsung.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Tetep nyambung di mana waé kalayan Chatforia pikeun iOS jeung Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Pesen anjeun tetep sinkron di antara wéb jeung mobile.
peoplePage.searchByPhoneOrUsername: Pilarian ku nomer telepon / nami pamaké

profile.title: Profil Pamaké
profile.mustLogin: Anjeun kudu asup pikeun ningali setélan.
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Témbongkeun pesen aslina jeung nu geus ditarjamahkeun
profile.noPrivateKey: Teu aya konci swasta dina alat ieu pikeun diekspor.
profile.setBackupPassword: Setél kecap konci pikeun énkripsi cadangan anjeun:
profile.enterBackupPassword: Lebetkeun kecap konci pikeun cadangan ieu:
profile.importSuccess: Konci swasta geus diimpor ka alat ieu.
profile.importFailed: Gagal ngimpor konci (kecap konci salah atawa file rusak).
profile.keysRotated: Pasangan konci anyar geus dijieun jeung konci publik geus diunggah.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Konci pribadi anjeun moal kungsi kaluar tina alat ieu. Ékspor salinan anu dilindungi ku sandi pikeun mbalikeun éta dina alat séjén.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Anjeun keur dina Free—anggo pilihan Gancang Panonpoé/Bulan di handap. Upgrade pikeun muka konci langkung seueur téma.
profile.backupDesc: Cadangan konci énkripsi anjeun pikeun mulangkeun pesen anjeun sacara aman dina alat séjén.
profile.freePlanCopy: Anjeun aya dina rencana gratis. Upgrade pikeun muka langkung seueur fitur sapertos cadangan, nomer tambahan, jeung pilihan privasi canggih.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Henteu tiasa muka portal tagihan. Mangga cobian deui.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Béjaan ka abdi lamun pesen abdi disalin
profile.followHint: Carita maranéhna bakal muncul dina feed Anu Anjeun Ikuti lamun maranéhna masang kalayan audién Pengikut (atawa Umum).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Alihkeun telepon jeung pesen téks asup ka telepon atawa surélék anjeun anu geus diverifikasi. Telepon/pesen kaluar bisa némbongkeun nomer Chatforia anjeun.
profile.errE164: Lebetkeun nomer telepon E.164 anu sah (contona, +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Pilih sahenteuna hiji tujuan (telepon atawa email).
profile.ageBandHint: Kami ngan nyimpen rentang umur (henteu tanggal lahir anjeun anu pasti) . Ieu dipaké pikeun ngajaga pasangan Random Chat tetep wajar.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Paké cocogkeun dumasar umur dina Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Lamun dihurungkeun, kami bakal nyobian nyocogkeun anjeun jeung jalma dina rentang umur anu cocog.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Saha waé anu bisa dijodokeun ka anjeun?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Anak rumaja salawasna dipadukeun ngan jeung anak rumaja séjén. Déwasa teu bisa dipadukeun jeung anak rumaja.
profile.teenMatchingNote: For safety, accounts in the 13–17 age range can only be matched with other 13–17 accounts in Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things you tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: When this is on, Foria can use your past Random Chat conversations (just with you) to keep the conversation flowing. You can turn this off any time.
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Alamat email pikeun ngirim béwara voicemail
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Digunakeun nalika ucapan sora anjeun teu sayogi.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Salam voicemail geus diunggah kalayan suksés
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemail ti nomer Chatforia anjeun bakal disimpen dina kotak asup Voicemail anjeun. Anjeun tiasa ngaktipkeun transkripsi jeung pangalihan dina rencana anu didukung.
profile.portHint: Hayang ngajaga nomer ayeuna anjeun? Anjeun tiasa mindahkeun ka Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Profil Pamaké
esim.desc: Meunang data sélulér pikeun Chatforia nalika anjeun jauh ti Wi-Fi.
esim.descActive: eSIM anjeun geus aktip jeung siap diatur.

sounds.freeNoticeStart: Anjeun aya dina Gratis — tones premium ditingalikeun tapi dikonci.
sounds.customComingSoon: Unggahan sora kustom bakal sumping enggal.
sounds.freeNotice: Anjeun aya dina Free — nada Premium dipidangkeun tapi dikonci. Upgrade pikeun muka sadayana.

aiSettings.title: Setélan AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Ngatur tarjamahan, balesan pinter, jeung réspon otomatis ForiaBot.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Kirim sababaraha pesen panungtung anu ditampi (anu geus disaring) ka AI pikeun nyarankeun balesan gancang.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Masker kecap kasar dina saran AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Lamun dihurungkeun, kecap-kecap nu geus ditandaan dina saran ti AI bakal disumputkeun
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Ngaktipkeun balesan otomatis nalika abdi keur sibuk

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when a call rings.
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Ngan nyimpen ciphertext dina server. Ngeureunkeun AI/Translate jeung pratonton moderasi.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: E2EE ketat diaktipkeun. AI/Translate bakal dipaéhan.
privacySection.strictE2EEDisabled: E2EE ketat dinonaktipkeun. AI/Translate diaktipkeun deui.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Parabot anu disambung
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: Teu aya parabot anu disambung kapanggih.
linkedDevicesPanel.renamePrompt: Lebetkeun nami anyar pikeun alat ieu

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Manage your Chatforia mobile plan, numbers, forwarding, and number porting.

options.heading: Choose how you want to use Chatforia
options.subheading: You can get a new Chatforia number, or bring your existing number from another carrier.
options.portNumber: Port your current number into Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Port your existing number
port.subheading: Pindahkeun nomer telepon anjeun ti operator anu ayeuna ka Chatforia. Pastikeun detilna cocog persis jeung akun operator anjeun pikeun nyingkahan telat.
port.success: Pamundut port parantos dikirim! Kami bakal ngabéjaan anjeun.

status.heading: Status porting
status.subheading: Lacak status paménta porting nomer anjeun.

wireless.exhausted: Data anjeun geus béak. Meuli pak anyar pikeun neruskeun ngagunakeun data sélulér.
wireless.dashboardIntro: Atur data mobile Chatforia anjeun, nomer telepon, setélan eSIM, jeung status rencana.

data.caption: Lacak pamakean data ayeuna jeung sésa saldo.
data.familyCaption: Data dibagi ka sakabéh anggota kulawarga anjeun.

plan.title: eSIM
plan.noneTitle: Teu aya plan mobile anu aktip
plan.noneBody: Pilih paket data pikeun ngaktipkeun Chatforia Mobile.
plan.noneBodyReady: Atur heula eSIM anjeun, teras pilih paket data nalika anjeun siap.
plan.familyBody: Rencana ieu mangrupa bagian tina kolam data kulawarga anu dibagikeun.

esim.title: Plan
esim.heading: Set up your eSIM
esim.subheading: Pasang eSIM anjeun pikeun ngagunakeun data Chatforia Mobile dina alat ieu.
esim.body: Jieun atawa buka kode QR eSIM anjeun teras turutan parentah aktivasi dina telepon anjeun.
esim.readyBody: eSIM anjeun parantos siap. Anjeun tiasa muka kode QR atanapi neruskeun ngatur rencana mobile anjeun.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.loadingExisting: Keur muat eSIM anu geus aya…
esim.errorReserve: Teu tiasa ngareservasi eSIM. Mangga cobian deui.
esim.iccidHint: ICCID sacara unik ngaidentipikasi profil eSIM ieu.
esim.secrecyNote: Jaga kode QR ieu tetep pribadi. Saha waé anu boga aksés bisa masang eSIM.

instructions.step1: Buka setélan data sélulér atawa mobile dina telepon anjeun.
instructions.step2: Pilih Tambahkeun eSIM atawa Pindai Kode QR.
instructions.step3: Pindai kode QR ieu sarta turutan léngkah-léngkah dina layar pikeun ngarengsekeun aktivasi.

phoneNumberManager.freeNumberHint: Nomer gratis anu tiasa didaur ulang sanggeus teu aktip.
phoneNumberManager.premiumNumberHint: Jaga nomer anjeun salami langganan Premium anjeun aktip.
phoneNumberManager.lockThisNumber: Kunci nomer ieu (tambahan mingguan, bakal sumping)
phoneNumberManager.premiumProtectedHint: Nomer Premium dilindungi tina daur ulang salami langganan Premium anjeun aktip.
phoneNumberManager.searchHint: Lebetkeun kode daérah 3 digit (AS/CA wungkul), atawa tinggalkeun kosong, teras pilari.
phoneNumberManager.premiumKeepFeature: Njaga nomer anjeun mangrupikeun fitur Premium.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotAssign: Teu tiasa masihan nomer éta. Bisa jadi kakara dipaké—cobian deui anu sanés.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotLease: Teu tiasa nyéwa nomer éta. Bisa jadi kakara dipaké—cobian deui anu sanés.
phoneNumberManager.couldNotProtectNow: Teu tiasa ngajagi nomer anjeun ayeuna.
phoneNumberManager.invalidAreaCode: Mangga lebetkeun kode wewengkon 3 digit (contona, 415) atawa tinggalkeun kosong.
phoneNumberManager.noInventory: Teu aya inventaris anu sayogi ayeuna.
phoneNumberManager.noFreeNumbers: Teu aya nomer gratis anu sayogi ayeuna.
phoneNumberManager.noInventoryAreaCode: Teu aya inventaris anu sayogi pikeun kode wewengkon éta ayeuna.
phoneNumberManager.noFreeNumbersAreaCode: Teu aya nomer bébas dina kolam kami pikeun kode wewengkon éta ayeuna.
phoneNumberManager.releaseConfirm: Leupaskeun nomer anjeun ayeuna? Éta tiasa dipasihkeun ka batur.
phoneNumberManager.releaseWarning: Nomer anjeun tiasa dileupaskeun dina {{count}} dinten. Upgrade ka Premium pikeun ngajaga éta tetep dilindungi.
phoneNumberManager.pickNumberHint: Pilih nomer Chatforia pikeun dipaké pikeun pesen jeung komunikasi di jero aplikasi.
phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Teu tiasa muat status nomer telepon.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Teu aya nomer anu ditugaskeun. Pilih hiji dumasar kana kode area pikeun ngamimitian ngirim pesen.

upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even when you’re away from Wi-Fi.

features.disappearing: Disappearing messages and basic privacy controls

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: All the essentials, without ads. Great for everyday messaging and calling.

features.allFree: Everything in Free, with no ads
features.forwarding: Forward calls and texts to your real phone number
features.support: Faster support when something goes wrong

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly)

features.themes: Unlock all premium color themes and app customizations
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools for rewrites, smart replies, and summaries
features.support: Priority support when you need help most
features.number: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual)
premiumAnnual.desc: Save more when billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, and priority support.

features.bestFor: Best for power users, remote workers, and heavy travelers

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Add global data to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country and currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: High-speed data subject to fair-use and network management policies

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
disclaimer.fairUse: High-speed data may be subject to fair-use limits, local network conditions, and regional availability.

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Small pack
small.bestFor: Best for short trips and light messaging.

medium.title: Medium pack
medium.bestFor: Best for everyday messaging, maps, and light media.

large.title: Large pack
large.bestFor: Best for longer trips and heavier app use.

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Share a single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Includes 20 GB of shared high-speed data — great for 2–3 light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits

family.disclaimer: Family packs create or top up a shared data pool. You can invite and remove members anytime.
family.footnote: Family packs share a single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability and limits depend on your country and local regulations.

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.

family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.

account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
account.a: Unduh aplikasi atawa anggo wéb, ketok "Jieun akun", verifikasi email/nomer telepon anjeun. Pikeun mulangkeun, anggo "Poho sandi".

privacy.q: Naha pesen diénkripsi ti tungtung ka tungtung?
privacy.a: Sumuhun. Mesen sareng telepon diénkripsi ti tungtung ka tungtung sacara standar. Ngan anjeun sareng nu nampi anu tiasa maca éta.

translate.a: Aktipkeun "Tarjamah Otomatis" dina Setélan → Tampilan & Basa. Kami narjamahkeun dina alat lamun didukung, upami henteu ngaliwatan API anu aman kalayan metadata minimal.

contact.a: Hubungi kami di support@chatforia.com. Lampirkeun tangkapan layar jeung aplikasi anjeun versi.

howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.

safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one of the most important tools for communication in today’s world. From personal conversations to business interactions, messaging apps allow people to stay connected instantly and efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely on messaging apps for daily communication with friends, family, and colleagues. Whether it's a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus on giving users control over their data and conversations. Features like encryption, privacy settings, and message controls allow users to communicate with confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues to evolve with new features such as AI-powered responses, translation, and multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even more powerful and versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built with these principles in mind, offering a fast, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience for a connected world.

global.title: The Future of Global Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once required phone calls or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, and more inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One of the biggest changes in communication is the reduction of geographic barriers. People can now connect with others across the world in near real time. Whether for personal conversations, business, or collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far less limiting.
global.translationDesc: Language has traditionally been one of the biggest obstacles to global communication. Today, built-in translation tools help bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users to communicate more easily even if they speak different languages, creating new opportunities for connection and understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect messages to be delivered quickly, and modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables more natural and fluid conversations.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes more digital, privacy and security are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like encryption and user-controlled settings help support a more secure communication experience.
global.futureDesc: The future of global communication will likely include more advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved translation, and enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue to become more intuitive and accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, helping people connect more easily across languages and borders.

index.title: Chatforia Blog
index.intro: Explore insights on communication, online safety, and how messaging technology is connecting people around the world.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: Ngeunaan Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia téh messenger multibasa anu aman kalayan énkripsi end-to-end, tarjamahan instan, jeung telepon sora/vidio. Misi kami basajan: ngabantu jalma nyambung—kalayan aman, pribadi, jeung lintas basa.

values.control: Kontrol: Pesen anu leungit & bukti dibaca téh opsional.
values.privacy_aria: Prioritas privasi: énkripsi E2E sacara standar.
values.access_aria: Aksés pikeun sadayana: Tarjamah otomatis 100+ basa.
values.control_aria: Kadalawanan: Pesen anu leungit sareng bukti dibaca téh opsional.

about.howDescription:
Pesen diénkripsi dina alat anjeun sateuacan kaluar ti dinya.
 Tarjamahan, cadangan, jeung sinkronisasi alat dirancang pikeun ngaminimalkeun naon anu bisa katingali ku server kami.
about.privacyDesc: Enkripsi ujung-ka-ujung jeung kontrol privasi geus aya dina Chatforia ti mimiti.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia ngabantu jalma nyambung ngaliwatan basa, alat, jeung wates.
about.controlDesc: Pilih kumaha pesen muncul, iraha éta leungit, jeung kumaha akun anjeun tetep aman.

press.title: Pers
press.contactLine: Pikeun patalékan média, hubungi kami di
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia nyaéta aplikasi pesen anu utamakeun privasi anu ngajadikeun obrolan lintas basa tanpa repot. Pesen-pesen éta ti mimiti nepi ka -pesen diénkripsi ti mimiti nepi ka tungtung sacara standar, sarta tarjamahan bawaan ngarojong leuwih ti 100 basa sacara real-time. Pamaké bisa ngaktipkeun pesen anu leungit, ngajaga bukti dibaca tetep opsional, sarta nyelapkeun data di sakuliah alat. Aya dina iOS, Android, jeung wéb.
press.assetsSubtitle: Logo, tangkapan layar, jeung gambar produk.
press.scanTip: Dina desktop? Pindai nganggo telepon anjeun pikeun meunangkeun aplikasi.

careers.title: Karir
careers.intro: Kami téh tim pangadeg leutik nu keur ngawangun Chatforia — hiji messenger pribadi global nu bakal diluncurkeun dina web, iOS, jeung Android. Lamun anjeun paduli kana privasi, énkripsi, jeung pangalaman pamaké nu pikaresepeun, kami bakal bungah ngadangu ti anjeun.
careers.openRoles: Lowongan pangadeg: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Kumaha cara ngalamar: Anggo tombol di handap pikeun ngirim email résumé anjeun jeung tautan.
careers.whyBullets:
• Bantu ngawangun dasar messenger global anyar.
• Ngaluarkeun perbaikan anu dianggo di web, iOS, jeung Android.
• Gawé langsung jeung pangadeg dina arsitéktur jeung arah produk.
• Ngawasaan widang anu pangpangaruhna dina tumpukan: pesen, sora, pidéo, énkripsi, telekomunikasi, AI.\ n• Gabung ti mimiti — saméméh basis pangguna ngagedé.

advertise.title: Iklan sareng Chatforia
advertise.description: Ngahontal pangguna pesen anu aktip kalayan penempatan anu santun jeung aman pikeun mérek. Kami nawarkeun inventaris banner di tempat anu katingali pisan, sponsor, sareng promosi imah. Palanggan premium henteu ningali iklan.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Kami ogé nyayogikeun inventaris ngaliwatan Google AdSense. Anjeun tiasa nargétkeun Chatforia nganggo ID penerbit {{pubId}}, atanapi ngagunakeun formulir di handap pikeun sponsor langsung.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Kami ogé nyayogikeun sababaraha inventaris ngaliwatan Google AdSense. Sponsor langsung sayogi—ngagunakeun formulir di handap.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Kami nuju ngaréngsékeun inventaris iklan kami. Béjakeun ka kami ngeunaan kampanye anjeun sarta kami bakal nyarankeun tempat pasanganna.

why.highSession: Frekuénsi sesi luhur jeung waktos cicing dina UI obrolan
why.brandSafe: Format aman pikeun mérek; watesan frekuénsi anu sopan
why.deals: Deal langsung atawa programmatik ngaliwatan AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Hatur nuhun! Pamundut anjeun parantos dikirim. Kami bakal ngabales enggal.
form.missingRequired: Mangga eusian nami, email, sareng pesen.
form.successToast: Hatur nuhun! Kami bakal ngahubungi anjeun enggal.
form.mailtoInfo: Muka klien email anjeun pikeun ngirim patalékan…
form.messageLabel: Caritakeun ka kami ngeunaan kampanye anjeun

contact.title: Hubungi Kami
contact.successMsg: Hatur nuhun—tim kami bakal ngabales liwat email.
contact.errorSend: Teu tiasa ngirim. Mangga email ka support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Informasi anu kami kumpulkeun
infoWeCollect.account: Info akun (misalna, email/télépon) pikeun nyieun jeung ngajaga akun anjeun.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Eusi anu dienkripsi (pesen/telepon) dienkripsi ti tungtung ka tungtung; kami teu tiasa maca éta.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostik/pamakéan sapertos log ragrag, jinis alat, atanapi analitik kasar pikeun ningkatkeun kinerja.

sms.title: Nomer telepon sélulér sareng SMS
sms.body:
Lamun anjeun milih masihan nomer telepon sélulér, kami ngagunakeunana pikeun ngaktipkeun fitur sapertos verifikasi akun, bewara login, jeung pesen antar-pamaké ngaliwatan SMS di mana dirojong. Kami tiasa ngirim pesen SMS transaksional nu patali jeung akun anjeun jeung kagiatan anjeun di Chatforia. Anjeun tiasa milih teu nampi pesen SMS iraha waé ku ngabales maké kecap opt-out nu dirojong (sapertos "STOP") atawa ku ngarobah preferensi bewara dina aplikasi. Kami henteu
 ngajual nomer telepon anjeun atawa ngagunakeunana pikeun pamasaran anu teu aya patalina.
sms.addRecipient: Tambahkeun panarima di luhur pikeun ngamimitian…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Pangbagian
sharing.body: Kami henteu ngajual data pribadi. Kami tiasa ngabagi data anu diwatesan ka pamrosés (contona, bewara push, analitik) dina kontrak anu ketat.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Barudak
children.body: Chatforia henteu ditujukeun ka barudak di handapeun umur 13 taun (atawa sakumaha diperlukeun ku hukum lokal anjeun).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ku ngagunakeun Chatforia anjeun satuju kana Sarat ieu. Lamun anjeun henteu satuju, ulah ngagunakeun layanan ieu.

accounts.title: Akun
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Pasihan inpormasi anu akurat sareng jaga kredensial tetep aman.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Anjeun tanggung jawab kana kagiatan dina akun anjeun.

acceptableUse.title: Pamakean anu ditarima
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Teu aya eusi ilegal, kasar, atawa ngalanggar hak; teu aya spam atawa panyalahgunaan otomatis.

sms.title: Komunikasi SMS
sms.body: Lamun anjeun nyayogikeun nomer telepon sélulér, anjeun satuju yén Chatforia tiasa ngirim pesen SMS ka anjeun anu patali jeung akun anjeun jeung pamakéan layanan, saperti bewara login, béwara kaamanan, jeung pesen nu patali jeung paguneman anu anjeun inisiasi atawa ilubiung di jerona. Kami henteu ngagunakeun SMS pikeun pesen promosi atawa pamasaran tanpa idin eksplisit ti anjeun. Tarif standar pesen jeung data tiasa dilarapkeun. Anjeun tiasa ngeureunkeun nampi pesen SMS iraha waé ku ngabales maké kecap konci ngeureunkeun nu disadiakeun (contona, "STOP") atawa ku ngapdet setélan bewara dina aplikasi.

yourContent.title: Eusi anjeun
yourContent.body: Anjeun tetep gaduh hak kana eusi anjeun. Anjeun masihan kami hak anu diperlukeun pikeun ngajalankeun layanan (contona, routing, panyimpenan, tarjamahan).

disclaimer.title: Pangecualian tanggung jawab & tanggung jawab
disclaimer.body: Layanan disayogikeun "sakumaha ayana" tanpa garansi. Nepi ka wates maksimal anu diidinan ku hukum, Chatforia henteu tanggung jawab kana karugian henteu langsung atawa karugian turunan.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Kebijakan Pangbalikan Dana
refund.intro: Di Chatforia, kami usaha nyayogikeun layanan kualitas luhur ka sadaya pangguna. Kebijakan Pangbalikan Dana ieu ngajelaskeun iraha pangbalikan dana tiasa dipasihkeun.

subscriptions.title: Langganan
subscriptions.body: Langganan ditagih di payun sacara periodik. Anjeun tiasa ngabatalkeun iraha waé ngaliwatan setélan akun anjeun atanapi platform anu dianggo pikeun mésér.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Henteu Tiasa Dipulangkeun
nonRefundable.body: Kami biasana henteu masihan pangbalikan dana pikeun waktos anu teu dianggo, periode langganan sabagian, atanapi gagal ngabatalkeun sateuacan diperpanjang.

thirdParty.title: Pameseran Pihak Katilu
thirdParty.body: Upami dipésér ngaliwatan pihak katilu -party platform sapertos Apple App Store, pamunduran kudu dipénta langsung ngaliwatan platform éta.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ulah Ngajual atawa Ngabagi Inpormasi Pribadi Kuring
doNotSell.body: Chatforia henteu ngajual inpormasi pribadi. Warga California masih tiasa ngirim pamundut dumasar kana CPRA ngaliwatan tombol di handap.

cookies.title: Setélan Cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia ngagunakeun cookie minimal (misalna, sesi, kaamanan). Kami henteu nganggo cookie iklan pihak katilu. Atur cookie ngaliwatan setélan panyungsi anjeun.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia ngan ukur ngirim SMS nu patali jeung akun jeung paguneman ka nomer telepon nu sacara éksplisit disayagikeun jeung disatujuan ku pamaké. Pesen nu biasana dikirim ngawengku kode login/verifikasi, béwara pangiriman pesen, béwara kaamanan, jeung apdet akun transaksional.

optIn.title: Kumaha pamaké ngadaptar
optIn.body: Pamaké ngadaptar ku cara ngasupkeun nomer telepon maranéhna nalika pendaptaran jeung milih kotak centang idin SMS dina kaca pendaptaran atawa nu husus

optOut.title: Kumaha cara pamaké kaluar
optOut.stop: Bales STOP ka sagala SMS Chatforia pikeun kaluar.

help.title: Bantosan
help.bodyPrefix: Bales HELP pikeun bantosan atanapi email

privacyTerms.title: Privasi & Sarat
privacyTerms.bodyStart: Ku satuju kana SMS, pangguna ogé satuju kana sarat kami

sms.addRecipient: Tambahkeun panarima di luhur pikeun ngamimitian…
